{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Yerin's spirit
| introduced = cradle-07-uncrowned
}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Yerin's spirit]] issued a warning before being cut.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c17">''Uncrowned'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
